title: crucianella disticha
intro: Crucianella disticha, also known as two-keel germander, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crucianella disticha include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Crucianella disticha typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
